Compliance verified clean: every statistic from FACTS.md (zero invented); cancer fear stats always paired with de-panic number (NNT~332 / RR 0.61); no brand/supplement/tea names (no Matula, no Manuka); 'cure' never promised to reader (used only as 'test of cure', explicit disclaimers, or critical refutation of sellers); eradication = antibiotics/doctor, healing = lining; doctor-prescribes line on every named regimen; disclaimers at head of cancer (Ch.2), treatment (Ch.3), rescue (Ch.5) chapters; red-flag urgent-care line present.
